title: Introduction to Addition with Objects

sentences.text: Look at these colorful objects arranged in two groups.
Today, we will learn how to combine these groups together!
We have three red blocks in one group and two blue blocks in another.
Let's combine these groups to find the total number of blocks.
Now, count with me! How many blocks do we have in total?
One, two, three, four, and five blocks in total!
Great job! We learned how to combine groups to add objects.
Remember, addition means finding the total when we put groups together!

teacherNotes: Engage students by using hands-on counting with available objects during the lesson.
